Write a TLA+ specification for the following:

The leader election phase of the Raft consensus algorithm. Servers hold terms and vote for candidates. A candidate wins if it gets a majority of votes.
I'll write a well-formed TLA+ specification with proper Init, Next, and invariants.

---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, Sequences

CONSTANTS
  Servers,  \* Set of server identifiers
  Majority \* Integer, at least half of Servers + 1

VARIABLES
  term,          \* Current term number for each server
  votedFor,      \* Candidate voted for in current term
  votesReceived, \* Votes received by each candidate
  state          \* Current state of each server: "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader"

ASSUME
  /\ Servers /= {}
  /\ Majority \in 1..Cardinality(Servers)

TypeOK ==
  /\ term \in [Servers -> Nat]
  /\ votedFor \in [Servers -> (Servers \cup {"None"})]
  /\ votesReceived \in [Servers -> Nat]
  /\ state \in [Servers -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

Init ==
  /\ term = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
  /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> "None"]
  /\ votesReceived = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
  /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

ElectionTimeout(s) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ term[s] = term[s] + 1
  /\ votedFor[s] = "None"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<term, votedFor, votesReceived>>

RequestVote(s, c) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
  /\ votedFor[s] = "None"
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = c]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<term, state, votesReceived>>

VoteGranted(s, c) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ votedFor[s] = "None"
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = c]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<term, state, votesReceived>>

VoteDenied(s, c) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ votedFor[s] /= "None"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<term, votedFor, state, votesReceived>>

VoteReceived(s, c) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
  /\ votesReceived[c] < Majority
  /\ votesReceived' = [votesReceived EXCEPT ![c] = @ + 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![c] = "Leader"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<term, votedFor>>

Next ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    \/ ElectionTimeout(s)
    \/ \E c \in Servers : RequestVote(s, c)
    \/ \E c \in Servers : VoteGranted(s, c)
    \/ \E c \in Servers : VoteDenied(s, c)
    \/ \E c \in Servers : VoteReceived(s, c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<term, votedFor, votesReceived, state>>

Write a TLA+ specification for the following:

A gossip (epidemic) protocol where N nodes periodically share updates. A node that receives an update marks it as 'infected' and spreads it in subsequent rounds.
I'll write a well-formed TLA+ specification with proper Init, Next, and invariants.

---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  N,          \* Number of nodes
  Updates,    \* Set of updates
  T           \* Number of rounds

ASSUME
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ Updates \subseteq Nat
  /\ T \in Nat

VARIABLES
  infected,   \* Set of infected nodes
  updates,    \* Set of updates received by each node
  round       \* Current round

TypeOK ==
  /\ infected \subseteq 1..N
  /\ updates \in [1..N -> SUBSET Updates]
  /\ round \in 0..T

Init ==
  /\ infected = {}
  /\ updates = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
  /\ round = 0

Next ==
  /\ round < T
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ i \in infected
       /\ updates' = [updates EXCEPT ![i] = @ \cup {u \in Updates : u \notin updates[i]}]
       /\ infected' = infected
       /\ round' = round + 1
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ i \notin infected
       /\ updates' = [updates EXCEPT ![i] = @ \cup {u \in Updates : u \notin updates[i]}]
       /\ infected' = infected \cup {i}
       /\ round' = round + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected, updates, round>> /\ (round = T)

THEOREM Invariant == 
  \A i \in 1..N : updates[i] \subseteq Updates

THEOREM Safety == 
  Spec => Invariant

THEOREM Liveness == 
  Spec => <> (infected = 1..N)

Dekker's Algorithm: a classic two-process mutual exclusion algorithm using turn and wants variables to prevent race conditions.

Hints: Use turn \in {1,2}, wants as a boolean array for two processes indexed 1..2.

---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals

VARIABLES turn, wants, pc

TypeOK ==
    /\ turn \in {1, 2}
    /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ pc \in [1..2 -> {"idle", "trying", "waited", "critical"}]

Init ==
    /\ turn = 1
    /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
    /\ pc = [i \in 1..2 |-> "idle"]

Request(i) ==
    /\ pc[i] = "idle"
    /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED turn

Wait(i) ==
    LET j == 3 - i IN
    /\ pc[i] = "trying"

    /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![i] = "waited"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

    /\ turn = i
    /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

Enter(i) ==
    LET j == 3 - i IN
    /\ pc[i] = "trying"
    /\ (wants[j] = FALSE \/ turn = i)
    /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Exit(i) ==
    /\ pc[i] = "critical"
    /\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
    /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ turn' = 3 - i

Next ==
    \E i \in {1, 2} :
        \/ Request(i)
        \/ Wait(i)
        \/ Resume(i)
        \/ Enter(i)
        \/ Exit(i)

MutualExclusion ==
    ~(pc[1] = "critical" /\ pc[2] = "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants, pc>>

    /\ channel' = TRUE

    /\ channel
    /\ channel' = FALSE
    /\ receiverState' = "received"

    /\ retries >= MaxRetries
    /\ ~ackChannel
    /\ senderState' = "error"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, channel, ackChannel, retries>>

Next ==
    \/ Send
    \/ Receive
    \/ Ack
    \/ Timeout
    \/ GiveUp
